parameters.responseBody: ={{ ({ ok: false, actionRef: $json.body.actionRef, status: 'secret_error', message: 'Invalid or missing x-webhook-secret or HMAC.', result: null, deduped: false }) }}

meta.description: Oria governed execution rail (dry-run), task-runner safe. Webhook -> Crypto HMAC -> IF(secret+HMAC) -> minimal pure Code (validate/route/transient) -> IF(pass) -> RemoveDuplicates(Kept/Discarded for actionRef dedup) -> Respond. No require()/$env/$getWorkflowStaticData in the Code node. Requires n8n env: ORIA_N8N_WEBHOOK_SECRET, ORIA_WEBHOOK_SIGNING_SECRET, and N8N_BLOCK_ENV_ACCESS_IN_NODE=false (Crypto/IF read secrets via $env expressions). No Crypto credential needed (Crypto v1 secret param via $env). Verified on n8n 2.26.6.
